isolation.notes: Fresh dedicated session used for this assertion group only

assertionResults.reason: Blocked by authentication prerequisite: /convert redirects to /sign-in in a fresh dedicated session, and Clerk sign-up remains stuck in loading state in headless automation while console logs a Private Access Token/Cloudflare challenge 401, so authenticated access to the conversion page was not achievable.

frictions.description: Clerk auth in headless agent-browser required Cloudflare/PAT challenge handling and sign-up stayed on Loading state instead of completing.
frictions.resolution: Retried in the same dedicated session, waited for completion, then attempted sign-in with the just-submitted email to confirm account creation did not complete.

blockers.description: Could not establish authenticated session required to reach /convert conversion UI.
blockers.details: Observed redirect to /sign-in from /convert, sign-up submit stuck in Loading, console contained 'Request for the Private Access Token challenge' and 401, then sign-in returned account-not-found/422.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried sign-up flow, waited >20s, captured console/network evidence, and retried sign-in using same credentials.

summary: Tested assigned conversion assertion group (VAL-CONV-001..028): 0 passed, 0 failed, 28 blocked by external auth challenge preventing authenticated access to /convert.
